gates.evidence: Workflow includes locked style, asset coverage, manifest and visual validation artifacts.
Strict top-down renderer, grid, layer and nearest-neighbor profile passes.
54 traced assets cover six characters, five map bases, aligned state variants, nine prop states and UI; no accepted placeholder method.
Seven Edge screenshots and contact sheet compare anchor, separate sources, compiled assets and in-engine output; old empty procedural rooms are no longer shipped visually.
Recruitment letter, Victor, overlap, daylight, servant graves and family-death reveal order preserved.
Opening identifies Grace, children, light risk and the first curtain action before exploration.
20-step route exercises threshold, tuning and evidence mechanics across persistent map changes.
Five maps, conditional portals and safe return paths remain reachable with new scene layers.
Keyboard and pointer/touch inputs remain wired with non-color prompts.
Unique storyteller-v021-save namespace and JSON state round-trip pass.
HTTP 200, source syntax, asset loading, project contract and deterministic route pass.
Prompts and outputs are project-original; no franchise characters, maps, tiles or UI are referenced.

limitations: Small walking sprites retain 16x24 handheld readability and therefore carry less facial detail than dialogue portraits.
Audio remains minimal generated WebAudio feedback rather than a composed score.
releaseDecision: Accepted as the regenerated 0.21-R2 art-production experiment at /v021/.
